calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections and the matter being properly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 17, 2001 is admitted to probate. Lori Chamberlin is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for February 21, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, no appearance will be necessary.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
